name: 9) Thai Shrimp Salad
method: Peeled and deveined uncooked large shrimp - ½ pound

In a large bowl, combine the lime juice, sesame oil, soy sauce, sesame seeds, mint, cilantro, and red pepper flakes.

Sprinkle shrimp with salt and pepper. Thread the shrimps onto 2 metal or soaked wooden skewers.
